title: Banks eye three ECB rate hikes this year as former Governor says he sees no stagflation — yet
summary_full: Brokers now expect the ECB to hike interest rates this year as the specter of higher inflation and lower growth piles pressure on central banks to act.
summary_public: Brokers now expect the ECB to hike interest rates this year as the specter of higher inflation and lower growth piles pressure on central banks to act.
